faqs.question: How quickly can you provide drain fly treatment in Windsor Terrace?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Windsor Terrace, Brooklyn. Our technicians can typically arrive within 24 hours of your call, and most drain fly treatments are completed in a single visit lasting 1-2 hours depending on the severity of the infestation.

faqs.question: What causes drain fly infestations in Windsor Terrace homes?
faqs.answer: Drain flies breed in the organic matter that accumulates in drains, particularly in kitchens, bathrooms, and basements. Windsor Terrace's older buildings often have drain buildup, standing water in floor drains, or moisture issues that create ideal breeding conditions. Leaky pipes and poor ventilation can also contribute to drain fly problems.

faqs.question: What does your drain fly treatment include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive drain fly treatment includes a thorough inspection to locate all breeding sites, mechanical cleaning of affected drains, application of bio-enzymatic treatments to eliminate organic buildup, targeted insecticide application when necessary, and recommendations for preventing future infestations. We also provide follow-up service if needed within our guarantee period.

faqs.question: Is drain fly treatment safe for my family and pets in my Windsor Terrace home?
faqs.answer: Yes, absolutely. We prioritize eco-friendly and low-toxicity treatment methods that are safe for children and pets. Our bio-enzymatic drain treatments are non-toxic and break down organic matter naturally. When insecticides are necessary, we use EPA-registered products applied by licensed professionals according to strict safety protocols.
